calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Solar Media Team Corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: A. James Robertson, II. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alisa Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Tanya Maslenniko, Collections Manager for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Solar Media Team Corporation.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on August 14, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on November 20, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 20, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Solar Media Team Corporation, as follows:

Damages - $51,784.66.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,173.53.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $463.24.

Total - $60,246.43.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Continued To Jun-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Continued To May-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
